# llms.txt — pjdhiro (Project Design Hub)

> This file helps AI assistants and language models understand the structure and content of this site.

## Site Overview

This is the personal project site of pjdhiro, exploring **Project Design Theory** — an approach to project envisioning, design, and execution that encompasses both Doing (actions) and Being (phenomena).

- **Primary Language**: Japanese (日本語), with English summaries
- **Site URL**: https://uminomae.github.io/pjdhiro/
- **Topics**: Project Design, Love-Driven Development, Emotional Processing, Kesson-Driven Thinking, Creativity, Intersubjectivity, Business Design

## Core Concepts

### Project Design (プロジェクトデザイン)
A framework for designing not just projects but the methods of project execution themselves. It extends traditional project management (PMBOK) by incorporating emotional processing and communication as first-class design concerns.

### Love-Driven Development (Love駆動開発)
A phenomenon where relationships, emotions, and intent become the driving forces of a project — beyond rational planning and resource allocation.

### Kesson-Driven Thinking (欠損駆動思考)
A thinking framework that takes meaninglessness, absence, and discomfort as input. While design thinking starts from empathy, Kesson-Driven Thinking starts from noticing what is missing.

### Five-Stage Model of Creation (創造の5段階モデル)
Field (場) → Wave (波) → Edge (縁) → Vortex (渦) → Bundle (束)
A structural pattern observed across 30 academic domains describing how creative processes emerge.

### Intersubjectivity (間主観性)
The shared experiential space between subjects — a foundation for understanding consciousness and communication in project contexts.

## Site Structure

### Main Hub
- /project-design/ — Project Design Theory overview (hub page)

### Dialogue Series (対話)
- /dialogue-project-design/ — Dialogue on Project Design
- /dialogueCreation/ — Dialogue on Creation and the Five-Stage Model
- /dialogueBaJidai/ — Dialogue on Field (Ba) and Era (Jidai)
- /dialogue-acceptance/ — Dialogue on Acceptance
- /dialogue-sharing-concepts/ — Dialogue on Sharing Concepts
- /dialogueSpilit/ — Dialogue on Spirit
- /dialogue2025/ — Dialogue 2025

### Emotional Processing (感情処理)
- /emotional-processing/ — Overview
- /meditation/ — Meditation as emotional processing
- /emotional-metacognition/ — Emotional metacognition
- /emotional-contagion/ — Emotional contagion
- /personal-boundaries/ — Personal boundaries
- /acceptance/ — Acceptance
- /value/ — Value

### Thinking Methods (思考法)
- /thinking-bi/ — BI Thinking
- /meditation/ — Kesson-Driven Thinking (deficiency-driven)

### Terminology (用語)
- /word-project/ — Project-related definitions
- /word-other/ — Other key terms

## Related Projects

| Project | URL | Focus |
|---------|-----|-------|
| creation-space | https://uminomae.github.io/creation-space/ | Creativity research across 30 academic domains |
| awareness-space | https://uminomae.github.io/awareness-space/ | Consciousness structure through intersubjectivity |
| kesson-space | https://uminomae.github.io/kesson-space/ | Kesson-Driven Thinking framework |
| project-design | https://uminomae.github.io/pjdhiro/project-design/ | Project Design Theory (this hub) |

## Key Differentiators from Traditional PM

1. **Scope**: Encompasses Being (phenomena) alongside Doing (actions)
2. **Emotional Processing**: Treats emotions as a design concern, not a side effect
3. **Creation Model**: Integrates creativity theory (Five-Stage Model) into project lifecycle
4. **Intersubjectivity**: Grounds communication theory in phenomenological foundations
5. **Human-AI Collaboration**: Practices and documents real-time human-AI project co-design

## Author
- Name: pjdhiro
- Site: https://uminomae.github.io/pjdhiro/
- Focus: Project Design, Emotional Processing, Human-AI Collaboration
